text: Religious education deals with Islamic religious education and ethics (PAI and BP). In SDN 2 Kesumadadi, there are many learnings related to faith in Allah through Asmaul Husna. And based on the material, it is found that the PAI teacher at SDN 2 Kesumadadi explains the complete Asmaul Husna by acting out the habituation of reading Asmaul Husna, even though only 4 of the names of Allah are explained in the material. Although only 4 names of Allah are explained in the material, the habituation of reading Asmaul Husna is a very important effort of PAI teacher to shape the religious character of the students of SDN 2 Kesumadadi, so that the religious values are inculcated deeply in the hearts of the students. This research is qualitative research with a field research approach. Data retrieval is done by observing, interviewing, and documenting. This research has resulted in the finding that there is no habituation of reading Asmaul Husna other than being done only in every religious lesson that is taught to students at SDN 2 Kesumadadi. Based on the results of observation and interviews, it can be concluded that the efforts made by the PAI teacher to shape the religious character of students at SDN 2 Kesumadadi through the habituation of reading asmaul husna is carried out by giving an example, habituating, mentoring, giving appreciation and penalty.
